_comment: Anthropic-hosted document skills. These carry a PROPRIETARY license (skills/<id>/LICENSE.txt in anthropics/skills) that forbids copying/redistribution/retaining copies outside the Services — so they are NOT vendored and NOT locally installable. We surface them as pointers so users can enable Claude's hosted versions. Do not add files for these.

skills.name: Excel (xlsx)
skills.description: Create and edit Excel spreadsheets with formulas and charts.

skills.name: PDF (pdf)
skills.description: Generate formatted PDF documents and reports.
